---
title: "Regression II"
subtitle: "Non-linear regression, splines, and the kernel trick"
date: "Sep 18, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Polynomials, step functions, regression splines, smoothing splines, and an introduction to the kernel trick — moving beyond the linear model while keeping the regression framework.

**Assigned reading:** ISLR ch. 7

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [Slides](slides_clean.pdf) | [Annotated slides](slides_annotated.pdf) | [Split view](slides_split.pdf)

**Code:** [fig1.R](code/fig1.R) [fig2.R](code/fig2.R) [fig3.R](code/fig3.R) [fig4.R](code/fig4.R) [fig5.R](code/fig5.R) [helper.R](code/helper.R) [lab1.R](code/lab1.R) [lab2.R](code/lab2.R)

**Supplementary readings:** [Stricker et al. (2017)](readings/Stricker et al. (2017).pdf) [Zimbalist et al. (2025)](readings/Zimbalist et al. (2025).pdf)
